query: scratched dusty damaged old film negative photo
message: sub:film_artifacts/scratch_decay — anti_aesthetic — scratches, dust spots, chemical stains, tintype/wet-plate degradation

response.objective_caption: A black and white close-up photograph of a concrete wall surface showing a prominent vertical crack running through the center with smaller branching fissures, dark vertical streaks of moisture or staining, and scattered pits and speckles across the rough, uneven texture.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A black and white close-up photograph of a concrete wall surface showing decay and degradation, with a prominent vertical crack running through the center and smaller branching fissures, dark water stains streaking downward, and scattered pits and speckles across the rough, uneven texture.
